visa_types.name: Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)
visa_types.documents_required:
-  Passport or other travel document:
- the expiration date of which is three months longer than the period up to which the visa is requested;
- in which at least two pages provided for visas are free.
- which has been published within the last 10 years;
- Foreign passport must be signed by the owner; copies of pages with visas, as well as entry and exit stamps of both passports.
- A completed visa application form (link:
https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/)
),
                                                                            which the visa applicant signed with his own hand;
- One color photograph (35 mm x 45 mm);
- Booking an air ticket or a copy of an air ticket - one way is enough.
- Bank statement for the last 3 months; (Transaction history)
- The health insurance policy is valid throughout the territory of the Schengen countries, valid for the entire trip, during which the foreigner assumes his stay in the Schengen countries.
                                                                            The insurance policy must have a minimum amount of EUR 42,600 and must cover the costs of emergency medical care and / or treatment in case of illness, as well as cover the costs
                                                                            of repatriation in the event of the death of a person.
- Confirmation of labor validity: a copy of an employment contract, documents confirming qualifications - diplomas, letters of recommendation from previous employers or certificates
                                                                            of work in a specific profession, a copy of a work record book.
- When applying for a visa, you must pay the state fee for the examination of the application for a visa. The state fee is 60 euros. An applicant for a visa must additionally
                                                                                submit supporting documents:
- Invitation - xxx-xxxxxx or PASxxx-xxxxxx
- Documents indicating the purpose of the trip;
- Other additional documents.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)]

Important Note:
- Please note all the fees are paid in the visa application center by using Uzcard cards, cash, VISA. Also, please kindly note that corporate cards are not accepted for payment. Please call at helpdesk or visit visa application center for more information.
- Visa fees once paid is not refundable under any circumstances including visa rejection.
visa_types.processing_time:
The embassy makes a decision on the application for a visa within 15 days from the date of receipt of the application and the documents necessary for issuing a visa. The period for making
                                                                        a decision on a visa application may be extended up to 60 calendar days in individual cases, in particular when an additional verification of the application is required.
The delivery time for documents from the Visa Application Center to the Embassy takes from 1 to 7 days, in accordance with the Visa Code (Art. 43 (11) Visa Code; Art. 23 Visa Code; Directive
                                                                        2004/38)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you plan to stay in Latvia for a longer period (more than 90 days and up to 12 months) on a work visa, you need to apply for a national visa to Latvia at the Latvian Visa Application
                                                                        Center. For all other purposes, to obtain a long-term visa to Latvia, you must contact the Embassy of the Republic of Latvia in Tashkent.
National visas are issued for the duration of no more than one (1) year.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you plan to stay in Latvia for a longer period (more than 90 days and up to 12 months) on a work visa, you need to apply for a national visa to Latvia at the Latvian Visa Application
                                                                        Center. For all other purposes, to obtain a long-term visa to Latvia, you must contact the Embassy of the Republic of Latvia in Tashkent.
National visas are issued for the duration of no more than one (1) year.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)]

Important Note:
- Please note all the fees are paid in the visa application center by using Uzcard cards, cash, VISA. Also, please kindly note that corporate cards are not accepted for payment. Please call at helpdesk or visit visa application center for more information.
- Visa fees once paid is not refundable under any circumstances including visa rejection.

## VFS SERVICE FEE
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge of the equivalent of 29 Euro (without biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for clients applying at the visa application centre (children under 6 years exempt from VFS fees). This is applicable for all categories of visa applications.

## Documents Required
-  Passport or other travel document:
- the expiration date of which is three months longer than the period up to which the visa is requested;
- in which at least two pages provided for visas are free.
- which has been published within the last 10 years;
- Foreign passport must be signed by the owner; copies of pages with visas, as well as entry and exit stamps of both passports.
- A completed visa application form (link:
https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/)
),
                                                                            which the visa applicant signed with his own hand;
- One color photograph (35 mm x 45 mm);
- Booking an air ticket or a copy of an air ticket - one way is enough.
- Bank statement for the last 3 months; (Transaction history)
- The health insurance policy is valid throughout the territory of the Schengen countries, valid for the entire trip, during which the foreigner assumes his stay in the Schengen countries.
                                                                            The insurance policy must have a minimum amount of EUR 42,600 and must cover the costs of emergency medical care and / or treatment in case of illness, as well as cover the costs
                                                                            of repatriation in the event of the death of a person.
- Confirmation of labor validity: a copy of an employment contract, documents confirming qualifications - diplomas, letters of recommendation from previous employers or certificates
                                                                            of work in a specific profession, a copy of a work record book.
- When applying for a visa, you must pay the state fee for the examination of the application for a visa. The state fee is 60 euros. An applicant for a visa must additionally
                                                                                submit supporting documents:
- Invitation - xxx-xxxxxx or PASxxx-xxxxxx
- Documents indicating the purpose of the trip;
- Other additional documents.

## Photo Specifications

Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Photograph attached (paper clipped) to the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs.

## Processing Time
The embassy makes a decision on the application for a visa within 15 days from the date of receipt of the application and the documents necessary for issuing a visa. The period for making
                                                                        a decision on a visa application may be extended up to 60 calendar days in individual cases, in particular when an additional verification of the application is required.
The delivery time for documents from the Visa Application Center to the Embassy takes from 1 to 7 days, in accordance with the Visa Code (Art. 43 (11) Visa Code; Art. 23 Visa Code; Directive
                                                                        2004/38)
                                                                    

## Download Form
 For Latvia, every applicant needs to provide a signed printout of the Schengen visa application form that has to be completed online (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/).
